title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at CMC Vellore

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at CMC Vellore
jsonLd.description:
CMC Vellore, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About CMC Vellore:
CMC Vellore is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CMC Vellore!
